name: 2kbigredflowers
description: NBA 2K26 build management, game tracking, and performance analytics
author: 2KBigRedFlowers

scripts.desktop:start: npm run stage && npm run desktop:forge -- start
scripts.desktop:package: npm run stage && npm run icons:desktop && npm run desktop:forge -- package
scripts.desktop:make: npm run stage && npm run icons:desktop && npm run desktop:forge -- make
scripts.desktop:make:win: npm run stage && npm run icons:desktop && npm run desktop:forge -- make --platform=win32 --arch=x64 && npm run artifacts:checksums
scripts.desktop:make:mac: npm run stage && npm run icons:desktop && npm run desktop:forge -- make --platform=darwin
scripts.desktop:make:mac:unsigned: npm run stage && npm run icons:desktop && npm run desktop:forge -- package --platform=darwin --arch=arm64 && npm run desktop:forge -- package --platform=darwin --arch=x64 && node scripts/archive-mac-app.cjs && npm run artifacts:checksums
scripts.mobile:sync: npm run stage && cap sync && npm run icons:native
scripts.android:add: npm run stage && cap add android && npm run icons:native
scripts.android:sync: npm run stage && cap sync android && npm run icons:native
scripts.android:apk: npm run android:sync && node scripts/android-gradle.cjs assembleDebug && node scripts/copy-android-apk.cjs && npm run artifacts:checksums
scripts.ios:add: npm run stage && cap add ios && npm run icons:native
scripts.ios:sync: npm run stage && cap sync ios && npm run icons:native
